choices.label: 35–50 µm; platte papillen; microechini ca. 0,5 µm.

outcome.text:
33.3.2 *Ranunculus parviflorus*

Papillen plat, 2–3 µm breed; microechini ca. 0,5 µm. Columellae diameter 1 µm. Poriën ca. 7 µm, afstand ca. 12 µm. Exine 2–2,5 µm.

*Ranunculus parviflorus* L. (2)
35,0–50,8 µm, MiW 42,0 µm; 50 PK, Oa
